steps.title: 05 · Read the field manual warning and code component theme scope case · theory
steps.instruction: Checkpoint 5: Which claim preserves css custom property cascade when data, input, and layout change? Scenario: field manual warning and code component theme scope.
steps.why: Trace Inheritance, Scope, and Local Overrides makes the decision observable and testable. This is checkpoint 5 in field manual warning and code component theme scope.

content.text: Unregistered custom properties inherit by default. A root declaration supplies a broad default, but closer component, theme, state, media, and user-origin declarations can win normally. Local overrides are useful component inputs when their names communicate meaning. The var() call resolves at the element where the consuming declaration computes, not where the variable was first declared. Apply it to field manual warning and code component theme scope.
